story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1101_0100_20: At last, it was time for the final scene...
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_0300_10: With you, I’m inspired to climb even higher.
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_0400_10: I won’t hold back this time.
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_0500_10: Let our hearts and souls clash...
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_0600_10:
and carve the memory of this battle into
everyone’s hearts!
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_0800_10: Surely you can shine even brighter!
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_1000_10:
Didn’t you know? Life shines brightest when
making a comeback!
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_1100_10: And now for the second act!
story_arceus_10_10000/2401_1001_1300_10:
(Amazing. She’s surpassed anything I could
have imagined...)
